footer.description: A crowdfunding platform with a more human tone, designed to highlight projects, their stories, and the people who support them.
footer.signature: Fund with confidence, elevate ideas with elegance.

about.title: Who are we?
about.intro: WeFund is a student project designed as a crowdfunding showcase with a more editorial, clear, and accessible tone.
about.projectBody: This project was imagined and developed in an academic context, with the goal of delivering a polished frontend experience around project discovery, campaign browsing, and support for the featured initiatives.
about.promotionBody: The project is carried by the Master MIAGE 2025-2026 cohort. It is part of a hands-on academic effort combining product thinking, user experience, and web development.

legal.title: Legal notice
legal.intro: This page presents the main contextual and usage information related to the WeFund project within its academic framework.
legal.editorBody:
WeFund is a student project created as part of the Master MIAGE 2025-2026 cohort.

The frontend was designed and developed by the group composed of Aymeric JAKOBOWSKI, Camille BARTHELEMY, Julien CONOIR, Florine PAWLOWSKI, and Alyocha YAHI.
legal.usageBody:
This website is presented as an academic demonstration.

The content, data, and user flows shown here are intended to illustrate frontend design and development work. They do not constitute a real commercial service or an active crowdfunding platform.

homePage.heroTitle: Projects worth seeing, supporting, and carrying further.
homePage.heroDescription: WeFund gives projects and their campaigns a clearer place to be discovered. Explore what is active or launch your own.
homePage.heroVisualHint: An editorial visual can sit here to dress the top of the page.
homePage.noCampaigns: No active campaigns at the moment.

notFound.title: This project couldn't find its page.
notFound.description: The content you are looking for does not exist, is no longer available, or the address is incorrect. Head back home or discover the featured projects.

projectForm.createPageDescription: Shape your title, text, and image while keeping an immediate preview of the card that will be displayed.
projectForm.editPageDescription: Update the title, text, and image while keeping an immediate preview of the final rendering.
projectForm.title: Create a project
projectForm.subtitle: Title, description and photo
projectForm.editSubtitle: Update the title, description, and image
projectForm.previewFallbackDescription: The project description will appear here as you type.
projectForm.mockInfo: Data is mocked in memory (no backend).

errors.usernameMinLength: Username must be at least 3 characters
errors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters

signup.title: Sign up
signup.subtitle: Create your WeFund account
signup.pageDescription: Create your space to launch a project, follow your campaigns, and support the initiatives that inspire you more easily.

login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Log in to your account
login.pageDescription: Access your WeFund space to follow ongoing campaigns, manage your projects, and continue browsing without friction.
login.pointOne: Review your projects and their campaigns in one place.
login.pointTwo: Manage your actions without losing the thread of your space.
login.pointThree: Come back easily to support, edit, or create.

campaign.pageDescription: Browse the campaigns currently visible on WeFund, follow the ones still running, and also find your drafts in a separate space.
campaign.draftSectionDescription: This section is reserved for your drafts. Other users cannot see these campaigns until they are published.
campaign.noCampaignYet: No campaign created yet for this project
campaign.projectUnavailable: The linked project is not available.
campaign.emptyActiveList: No active campaigns at the moment.
campaign.emptyFinishedList: No finished campaigns at the moment.
campaign.emptyDraftList: No draft campaigns at the moment.

campaignForm.title: Create a campaign
campaignForm.subtitle: Title, description, target amount and end date
campaignForm.pageDescription: Set a clear title, a precise goal, and a readable deadline to prepare your campaign before publication.
campaignForm.projectContextDescription: A few useful pointers to place this new campaign within the current pace of the project.
campaignForm.draftHint: This campaign will remain private while it stays in draft.
campaignForm.publishHint: This campaign will be sent for review.
campaignForm.draftTooltip: A draft campaign is only visible to you. When unchecked, it moves to pending review.

funding.title: Support this campaign
funding.subtitle: Use our demo banking flow to complete your contribution.

payment.title: Bank payment
payment.subtitle: Secure payment simulation for this contribution.
payment.success: Payment approved. Your contribution has been recorded.
payment.processingHint: Checking card details, bank authorization and payment confirmation.
payment.amountHelper: Choose any amount you want to contribute.

errors.expiryInvalid: Expiry date must use MM/YY format

contributions.title: My contributions
contributions.refundDialogBody: Do you really want to withdraw your support and request a refund for this contribution?
contributions.processingHint: Simulating banking checks and contribution update.

refund.reasonHelper: Briefly explain why you want to withdraw your support.

project.pageDescription: Discover the projects featured on WeFund, their worlds, their intentions, and the campaigns that can support them.
project.detailsSummaryDescription: Find the current state of this project's campaigns, the key information, and the next actions available from here.
project.draftCampaignsDescription: These campaigns are still drafts. They are only visible to you until they are published.
project.emptyDraftCampaigns: No draft campaigns for this project.
